metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p == "operator":
              # Subject is a mission/spacecraft
              # Prefer phrasing matching reference sentences
              return f"The {subj} was operated by {obj}"
with:
  if p == "operator":
              # Subject is a mission/spacecraft
              # Prefer phrasing matching reference sentences
              return f"{obj} operated {subj}"
          if p == "dateofretirement":
              # Format retirement date similarly to birth/death dates
              return f"{subj} retired on {fmt_date(obj)}"
          if p == "almamater":
              # Provide a natural phrasing for education
              return f"{subj} graduated from {obj}"

diff_user.system:
You are an expert in fixing your collegues code. You know that the code should be in format:
<<<<<<< SEARCH
# Original code to find and replace (must match exactly, indentations and endlines as well)
=======
# New replacement code
>>>>>>> REPLACE
Provided the incorrect format of SEARCH/REPLACE fix it to a correct format.
responses:

            # Prefer phrasing matching reference sentences
            return f"The {subj} was operated by {obj}"
=======

        if p == "dateofretirement":
            # Format retirement date similarly to birth/death dates
            return f"{subj} retired on {fmt_date(obj)}"
        if p == "almamater":
            # Provide a natural phrasing for education
            return f"{subj} graduated from {obj}"
>>>>>>> REPLACE
